individual_replies.question: Is the color exactly as shown in the picture?
individual_replies.drafted_reply: Colors may vary slightly due to screen resolutions and studio photography lighting, but the kurti is indigo blue with traditional floral hand block prints.

pattern_flags.suggested_addition: Available sizes: S, M, L. Please refer to our size chart for detailed measurements.

individual_replies.question: Is the sole slip resistant?
individual_replies.drafted_reply: Yes, the footwear features an anti-slip TPR rubber outsole which provides a secure grip on both wet and dry surfaces.

individual_replies.question: cushioning walk ke liye soft hai na?
individual_replies.drafted_reply: Haan, is flat sandal ka footbed padded hai jo chalte samay extra support aur aaram pradan karta hai.

individual_replies.question: indha sandal size 6 eppo varum?
individual_replies.drafted_reply: Currently, size 6 for this sandal is out of stock. We expect it to be restocked within a week. Please check back soon!
